pi_items.source: Task description explicitly states 'Save the final document as /home/ga/Documents/StockPulse_WMS_User_Manual.odt'
Task description states 'based on the system specifications provided in /home/ga/Documents/system_specs.json'; setup_task.sh creates this file at this path
Verifier checks file_size < 8192 as minimum gate. 8KB is reasonable for ODT with 40+ paragraphs, 7 H1, 10 H2, 4+ tables.
Task description: 'At least 7 main sections (Heading 1)'; system_specs.json provides exactly 7 required_sections
Task requires tables for System Requirements, Keyboard Shortcuts (12 items), Error Codes (7 codes), plus workflows. system_specs.json provides data for at least 4 tables.
Task description: 'The document must be substantial (at least 40 paragraphs)'
Task description: 'An auto-generated Table of Contents'
Task description: 'A Footer with page numbers'
Found in system_specs.json: document title and system_overview.name contain 'StockPulse WMS'
Found in system_specs.json: document_metadata.company = 'Cascade Distribution Group, LLC'
Found in system_specs.json: required_sections contains 'Receiving and Put-Away'; workflows contain 'receiving' workflow with 8 steps
Found in system_specs.json: required_sections contains 'Picking, Packing, and Shipping'; workflows contain 'picking' workflow with 7 steps
Found in system_specs.json: required_sections contains 'Cycle Count and Inventory Adjustments'; workflows contain 'cycle_count' workflow with 6 steps
Found in system_specs.json: system_overview.name = 'StockPulse WMS'; glossary.WMS = 'Warehouse Management System'

privileged_info_summary: The task creates a professional End-User Manual for StockPulse WMS at Cascade Distribution Group. The system_specs.json input contains 7 required sections (Introduction, System Requirements, Dashboard, Receiving, Picking, Cycle Count, Troubleshooting), 3 workflows with 21 total steps, 7 error codes, 12 keyboard shortcuts, and 4 system requirement components. The manual must include a Table of Contents, page numbers in footer, minimum 7 Heading 1 sections, 10 Heading 2 subsections, 4 formatted tables, and 40 paragraphs of content. All metadata requirements (file paths, minimum sizes, keywords) are aligned with task description and input data specifications.
